title: Button group needs to pass which button was pressed in payload
description: Button group (e.g. buttons-ai-responses) children fire click with empty coords {}. Consumer has no way to know which child button was clicked. Need label and id (child key) in the payload.

test.command: payload build --component button --event click --label "This was helpful" --id helpful

resolution: Added label and id to button click payload shape. Builder passes childId (child key) and label in coords. payload-delegate forwards --label.
